creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Seems the upstream version is 0.09 [1]:

 * Can you create an issue upstream to add a tag for that version.
 * Update patch to use USE_GITHUB and GH_* variables. DISTNAME, MASTER_SITES, GITVERSION, and WRKSRC overrides aren't required when using them.

[1] https://github.com/openresty/lua-rds-parser/blob/master/Makefile#L1
